_comment: Registry of ports that are built by .github/workflows/build_ports.yml. Each entry is keyed by a short port id used as the workflow choice input and the concurrency group. Add a new port by creating buildtools/<id>/<id>/src/{Dockerfile,build.txt,docker-setup.txt,retrieve-products.txt}, adding an entry here, and seeding a .upstream-sha marker in the target_dir.
